subject: WM-0009 ready for review
body: Fixed source-location regression by restoring quoted-key lookup for plain JSON while keeping JSON5 bare-key lookup comment-aware. Plain JSON invalid IDs and missing references now resolve to the offending quoted field/value instead of 1:1, and JSON5 bare keys still skip // and /* */ comments. Added regression coverage for quoted JSON source locations and comment-aware JSON5 bare-key source locations, then re-ran content tests, content validation, core-smoke compile, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.
